rulings.Case Title: JESSE BEVERLY JR VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 15, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Brayton Purcell¿s motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff is granted. No opposition filed. Hearing required unless a representative of Brayton Purcell is informed by Mr. Beverly that he does not wish to contest the tentative ruling. = (220/HEK)
